title: Online form to report abuse of Temporary Foreign Workers: Consulates and Advisory groups - Canada.ca
content:
## Online form to report abuse of Temporary Foreign Workers: Consulates and Advisory groups
If you are in danger please call 9-1-1 immediately. This is a free call from any Canadian telephone number.
Anyone can make a report. We take all reports of abuse of temporary foreign workers very seriously.
All information is protected by Canada’s privacy laws and reports will be kept confidential.
We will never reveal to an employer who made the report. However, we may share this information with other Canadian government departments or agencies who can help.
Read our full privacy statement

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
